---
title: "Linear Programming"
description: |
  Exploration in Linear Programming (LP).
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Concepts


![Linear Programming 01](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-01.png){width=50%}![Linear Programming 02](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-02.png){width=50%}

![Linear Programming 03](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-03.png){width=50%}![Linear Programming 04](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-04.png){width=50%}

![Linear Programming 05](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-05.png){width=50%}![Linear Programming 06](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-06.png){width=50%}

![Linear Programming 07](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-07.png){width=50%}![Linear Programming 08](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-08.png){width=50%}

![Linear Programming 09](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-09.png){width=50%}![Linear Programming 10](images/linear-programming/Linear_Programming-10.png){width=50%}
